calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-05-2015 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday March 5, 2015 in Department 525:
Daniel Crowley, Esq. Counsel for Respondent/Plaintiff Hazal Inc. and for Nurettin Ulas who is also present.
Kurt Harrison, Appellant/Defendant who is also present.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.
Counsel Daniel Crowley informed the Court that the matter is settled and stipulation has been signed by the parties. Counsel gave a copy of the stipulation to Mr. Harrison in the Court.

Kurt Harrison confirmed that the matter is settled to the Court.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court makes the ruling that appeal is dismissed - case settled. No evidence presented to the Court by any parties.

Judge Elliott Myles; Clerk J. Kong; matter not reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jan-21-2015 Judgment Entered
